## What happened

A clear description of what went wrong.

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen instead.

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Environment

- **Version:** (see `version.py` or the GUI title bar)
- **Build target:** Standard EXE (T2) / Standalone EXE (T3) / Dev (Python, T1)
- **OS:** Windows version
- **Trigger:** GUI action / Daily Sync (`daily_update.py`) / Background Timer

## Log output

Paste the relevant section from the log file (`garmin_data/log/` or the `daily_*.log` file).

> ⚠️ Before pasting: please double-check the log doesn't contain a token, password,
> or `Authorization: Bearer ...` fragment. Truncation in the log is only partial —
> if in doubt, remove the line rather than risk it.

## Additional context

Anything else that might be relevant — recent changes to your setup, Garmin account
status, antivirus/firewall, etc.
